inputs.description: Toggles between open, stop, close. For single button control.
Window is closed and locked for further operation when on. Control via user interface is still possible.
Pulse stops movement. On locks the block. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.
Input is used to report the “fully opened” position via a limit switch or similar.
Input is used to report the “fully closed” position via a limit switch or similar.
Input indicating the current tilt position or opening width of the window.
Moves window to slightly open position if current position is different.

outputs.description: Position of the window (0.0 = closed, 1.0 = open)

Output for target tilt position or target opening width (Schüco). - When input (Po) is ON (rising edge), the target position is set to 100. - When input (Pc) is ON (rising edge), the target position is set to 0. - If either input (Po) or input (Pc) are OFF (falling edge), the target position adopts the value of input (CPos). If input (CPos) is not connected, the target position will be calculated.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Minimum travel time at pulse on input (Po) or (Pc).
Duration of motor lock between direction changes

properties.description: Number of entries in the activity log. 0: log is disabled The activity log tracks relevant changes since program start.
